jsonld.name: Pedagogical Feedback Inversion
jsonld.description: The asymmetry where successful pedagogical withholding produces no visible evidence of success while failed withholding produces clear frustration signals, and successful over-explaining produces satisfaction signals while its developmental damage remains invisible.
